stan_swiata.opis: Second consecutive day of US-Iran mutual strikes confirmed; tanker hit in Gulf of Oman — sustained conflict keeps oil supply disruption risk high, directly affecting Polish energy prices.
Ukraine continues deep strikes inside Russia (military plant hit); conflict ongoing on Poland's eastern border with no qualitative change.
Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17; ongoing Middle East conflict entangled with Iran situation, limited direct impact on Poland.
Pakistan air strikes in Afghanistan continue; funerals held — regional flare-up with minimal direct impact on Poland.
WWII army unit naming dispute between Poland and Ukraine continues without resolution; low-level diplomatic friction fading into background.
